text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The morning of the New Year is calm and
tranquil...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Until the peace is suddenly shattered by some
shocking news!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Dawn of the Ultimate Era! Renowned runners
sprint back into the limelight!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Breaking news! A group of racers who returned to
the track yesterday after a long hiatus have just
finished a press conference.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
They've all announced their intention to step
back onto the G1 tracks this year!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Each of them is a fierce contender with a storied
resume under her belt.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki! Why did you decide to announce your
participation in the G1 at this time?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... That's a difficult question... If I had to say,
it's because we want to be an obstacle.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: ...Pardon?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All of us here are joining the races to pose a
monumental challenge to our younger peers.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know you're out there—we're waiting for you
and excited for the challenge.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
This new and exciting era is truly just getting
started! This year's races are shaping up to be
something special!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: An obstacle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash looks shaken after watching the news
report.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It can't be... This can't be happening...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Are you telling me I must face foes of their caliber
once again?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You're right. I've done well in my races thus far.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, I know the full extent of their
capabilities, and I'm not sure I'll be able to
overcome them this time...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The races will be even fiercer with their
participation. My chances of winning will surely
drop...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: But with that said...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I just promised to show my parents how much I
have grown.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's looking like I might not be able to keep my
promise to them...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: "A little"? How much is that, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And what do you mean by "calm down"? Do I not
appear calm at the moment?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shock of the news is sending Eishin Flash into
a rapid spiral. A change in scenery would do her
good right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to take her out to do our first shrine visit
of the year, but...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you see the news?! This year's races are
gonna be sick!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
No kidding. I'll be watching every second of them.
I do feel bad for the younger racers, though.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I mean, just think of how tough it'll be for the
racers who just entered their classic year to run
against opponents like that.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Dang, that's true... Those poor newcomers...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Something else... Like what, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash has shown a keen interest in Japanese
culture before, so that could be just the ticket
right now!
choice_data_list: Let's laze around for New Year!
Let's go write down our wishes!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Is that really something to be so enthusiastic
about?
choice_data_list:
The most important thing is to carry out your
plan with intention!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that makes sense... All is dependent
upon one's intention, after all.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Falcon has previously recommended I try "lazing
around" too, so I'll give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the suggestion. I shall refresh
myself with a fifteen-minute nap.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I had a wonderful dream in which a bird named
Mambo flew toward Mount Fuji and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash looks much better after a quick nap
in my office.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I know about this tradition. We are to write on a
wooden plaque called a "prayer tablet," correct?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've been interested in this custom for some time,
but since we can only do it once a year, I haven't
had the chance to try it.
choice_data_list: All the more reason to do it, then!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Agreed. I believe that's the booth over there...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I wrote, "I wish to carry out my schedule
perfectly."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I live by those words. What did you write?
choice_data_list: I had a feeling I knew what you'd write, so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I show her my plaque, on which I wrote, "I hope
Eishin Flash can carry out her schedule perfectly
without overexerting herself."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You saw right through me... I'm not at all
surprised.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My relief is immeasurable when Eishin Flash finally
cracks a small smile.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Right now? But I thought that the custom in
Japan was to send New Year's cards in advance of
New Year's Day.
choice_data_list:
Yeah, but you can give your first greeting of the
year any time around the holiday.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean to say it would not be a cultural
faux pas to exchange cards in person?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Very well. Let's ready some cards at once.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go buy New Year's cards, write messages, and
exchange them on the spot. When I hand my card
to Eishin Flash...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? I'm pretty good at replicating
photos on paper if I do say so myself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping for a chance to show you this, so this
is perfect.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows me her New Year's card proudly. On it
is an anatomically correct drawing of a ladybug
with the phrase "Fortune unto you" in Japanese.
